mentions.note: Pivoting from failing shoe business to 'AI compute infrastructure' via $50M convertible bond and name change to Newbird AI. Stock rallied 600% on this bizarro story. Speculative bridge too far; shoe maker cannot compete with Nvidia/TSMC/CoreWeave in GPU/compute space.
Pivoting from shoe company to AI compute infrastructure via $50M convertible bond is speculative bridge too far; belongs in closet or cage; shell abuse warrants SEC review.
